analysis: Risk-off, anxiety-laden environment. NYSE trading floor shows serious, focused trader expression with no celebration or excitement. Prominent military naval vessel imagery (Strait of Hormuz warship) conveys geopolitical tension. Headlines dominated by fear-driven narratives: Middle East war, gold rising as safe-haven demand, oil soaring from tanker disruptions. All major equity indices in the red (S&P -0.42%, Dow -0.41%, Nasdaq -0.29%). Green only on defensive commodities (oil +6.61%, gold +1.69%). Dark theme reinforces somber atmosphere. Overall sentiment: heightened fear and caution due to geopolitical tensions, well below neutral but not outright panic.
